title: Service Management Integration
description: Allow jarvy to start project services (docker-compose, tilt) that developers define in their projects, providing a unified way to start local development environments
acceptance_criteria: Support docker-compose.yml file detection and startup
Support Tiltfile detection and startup with tilt
Manual start via jarvy services start command
Manual stop via jarvy services stop command
Status check via jarvy services status command
Works in CI mode with appropriate defaults
Graceful handling when docker/tilt not installed

context.user_workflow: Developer creates docker-compose.yml or Tiltfile in their project. Jarvy configuration can specify to start these services during setup or on-demand.

supported_backends.name: docker-compose
supported_backends.detection: docker-compose.yml or compose.yml in project root

tasks.title: Create services module
subtasks: Create ServiceConfig struct for parsing config
Implement detect_services() to find compose/tilt files

tasks.title: Add services config parsing
tasks.config_example:
[services]
enabled = true
auto_start = true
compose_file = "docker-compose.yml"  # optional override
# or
tilt_file = "Tiltfile"  # optional override

tasks.title: Integrate with setup flow
tasks.description: Optionally start services after jarvy setup
subtasks: Start services after tool installation completes
Skip in CI mode unless explicitly enabled
Show service startup in dry-run output

tasks.title: Write tests
subtasks: Test error handling when docker/tilt not installed

tasks.title: Update documentation
subtasks: Add example jarvy.toml with services config

implementation_notes.detection_priority: Docker Compose takes priority over Tilt if both are present
implementation_notes.ci_behavior: Services are NOT auto-started in CI mode by default (CI pipelines have their own service orchestration)
implementation_notes.error_handling: Missing docker/tilt results in warning, not error - user may not need services
implementation_notes.no_new_deps: Uses shell commands to interact with docker/tilt, no new Rust dependencies

config_example.full:
[services]
enabled = true
auto_start = true
compose_file = "docker/docker-compose.yml"
# tilt_file = "Tiltfile"

risks.description: Docker/tilt not installed on user's system
risks.mitigation: Graceful warning, suggest installing via jarvy
Show clear error from docker/tilt, suggest checking compose/tilt file
Disable auto_start in CI mode by default, require explicit opt-in

related_tasks: PRD-010 - CI/CD Detection (for CI mode handling)
